description: A reader should fail sync when the seed emits WANT for an object that MANIFEST did not advertise as reachable from accepted sync roots.

assertions.description: Reader rejects WANT because the requested object is not reachable from the accepted sync roots established by MANIFEST.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the unadvertised WANT violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with the sibling post-MANIFEST accepted-root negative interop case for non-revision objects.
The seed still uses the normal peer-store transcript generator, but the harness injects WANT for an unadvertised object immediately after MANIFEST.
